digest.en: The White House says a ceasefire with Iran continues, alongside economic pressure. Iran seized two ships in the Strait of Hormuz after US President Trump extended the ceasefire. US Navy chief Admiral Jim Moffat was fired, effective immediately, amid reports of bad relations.
digest.hi: UPMSP UP Board 10th Result Live की खबरें प्रमुख हैं। नतीजे जल्द ही जारी किए जाएंगे। इस बीच मुर्शिदाबाद में देसी बम से हमला हुआ, कई लोग घायल हुए हैं।

articles.title: ‘Ceasefire continues, so does economic pressure on Iran’, says White House press secretary
articles.summary: The White House press secretary said Iran's economic pressure continues despite the ceasefire, with no indication of a time frame for ending the war. The US maintains economic pressure on Iran.

articles.title: Reported Seizure of Ships Injects New Uncertainty Over Peace Talks
articles.summary: Iran's Revolutionary Guards seized two ships near the Strait of Hormuz. Iran’s Revolutionary Guards said they had seized two ships near the Strait of Hormuz. A Trump spokeswoman said the president did not view those actions as violating the cease-fire.

articles.title: US says 'no time frame' on ending war with Iran, as Tehran says reopening Strait of Hormuz 'not
articles.summary: The US has no time frame for ending the war with Iran, while Tehran says reopening the Strait of Hormuz is not possible. The US and Iran remain at odds over the conflict.

articles.title: Iran seizes two ships in Strait of Hormuz after Trump extends ceasefire
articles.summary: Iran seized two ships in the Strait of Hormuz, including one linked to Israel, after the US extended a ceasefire. The US extended the ceasefire until Iran presents a peace proposal, but Tehran has not confirmed the extension.

articles.title: A Look At Coinbase Global (COIN) Valuation After Recent Security Shock To The Crypto Sector
articles.summary: The recent security breach at Coinbase Global has raised concerns about the crypto sector's valuation. The incident has sparked worries about the stability of the sector. A Look At Coinbase Global (COIN) Valuation After Recent Security Shock To The Crypto Sector Yahoo Finance.

articles.title: Iran attacks 3 ships in the Strait of Hormuz as Trump indefinitely extends ceasefire
articles.summary: Iran attacked three ships in the Strait of Hormuz, prompting the US to indefinitely extend a ceasefire. The US move aims to de-escalate tensions in the region. Iran attacks 3 ships in the Strait of Hormuz as Trump indefinitely extends ceasefire AP News.

articles.title: Trump Fires Top US Navy Official, Reports Cites "Bad Relations" With Hegseth
articles.summary: US Navy Secretary John Phelan left his post effective immediately. The Pentagon announced his departure. John Phelan reportedly has close ties to Donald Trump. Trump Fires Top US Navy Official, Reports Cites "Bad Relations" With Hegseth.

articles.title: Trump targets NATO allies over Iran war support
articles.summary: Trump targeted NATO allies over Iran war support, creating a list. 'Naughty and nice list': Trump targets NATO allies over Iran war support. Report WION.

articles.title: "Not A Deal-Breaker," Says US After Iran Fires At 3 Ships In Hormuz
articles.summary: Iran fired at three ships in the Hormuz Strait. The US called it not a deal-breaker. US-Iran War News Live Update:. "Not A Deal-Breaker," Says US After Iran Fires At 3 Ships In Hormuz.

articles.title: US Navy chief leaving post 'effective immediately', Pentagon says
articles.summary: US Navy Secretary John Phelan is leaving his post. The Pentagon said it is effective immediately. US Navy Secretary John Phelan is the latest high-ranking military leader to leave the administration in recent months.

articles.title: US and Iran in blockade stalemate; Erdogan says war ‘starting to weaken Europe’
articles.summary: US and Iran are in a stalemate over a blockade. Turkish President Erdogan said the war is "starting to weaken Europe". The situation remains tense with no resolution in sight.

articles.title: Iran Says Reopening Strait of Hormuz 'Not Possible' Under US Naval Blockade
articles.summary: Iran said reopening the Strait of Hormuz is not possible under US naval blockade. US-Iran war broke out on February 28. Iran Says Reopening Strait of Hormuz 'Not Possible' Under US Naval Blockade.

articles.title: Chemical leak at U.S. plant kills two, sends 19 more to hospital: Officials
articles.summary: A chemical leak at a US plant killed two people and sent 19 others to the hospital. The leak involved a reaction between nitric acid and another substance. Officials are investigating the incident.

articles.title: Trump weighs consequences for some NATO allies over Iran war
articles.summary: US President Trump is considering consequences for some NATO allies regarding their stance on the Iran war. The move could impact the alliance's dynamics. Trump's decision is pending. Trump weighs consequences for some NATO allies over Iran war LiveNOW from FOX.

articles.title: U.S. Navy Secretary John Phelan fired by Pentagon
articles.summary: US Navy Secretary John Phelan was fired by the Pentagon. Mr. Phelan's departure also comes just weeks after Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth fired the Army's top officer, Gen. Randy George, as well as two other top generals in the Army.

articles.title: Iran releases video of IRGC seizing ship in the Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: Iran's Revolutionary Guard released a video showing its forces seizing a ship in the Strait of Hormuz. The video appears to show Iranian forces boarding the vessel. Iran’s revolutionary guard has released a video said to show its forces seizing a ship in the Strait of Hormuz.

articles.title: Officials release cause of death for teen found dead in singer D4vd's car
articles.summary: A 14-year-old's cause of death was determined months ago. The medical examiner released the information. The medical examiner said the 14-year-old's cause of death was determined months ago but was blocked from release.

articles.title: UK, France agree 3‑year deal to curb Channel crossings
articles.summary: The UK and France agreed to a three-year deal to curb Channel crossings. Funding will be halted after one year if France fails to meet migrant reduction targets. For the first time, the deal links some UK payments to France to performance in stopping migrants.

articles.title: LinkedIn Gets New CEO
articles.summary: Microsoft's LinkedIn appointed Daniel Shapero, currently Chief Operating Officer, as its new CEO. Shapero takes over the leadership role at the professional networking platform. Microsoft's LinkedIn named Chief Operating Officer Daniel Shapero as its new CEO.

articles.title: Israel kills Lebanese journalist; Tehran-US talks stalled
articles.summary: Israeli attacks on Lebanon killed at least five people, including Lebanese journalist Amal Khalil. The incident occurred as talks between Tehran and the US remain stalled. Israeli attacks on Lebanon killed at least five people on Wednesday, including Lebanese journalist Amal Khalil.

articles.title: Iran says won't reopen Hormuz as long as U.S. blockade remains
articles.summary: Iran seized two ships attempting to cross the Strait of Hormuz and has not decided on joining new US talks. Iran Guards say 'seized' two ships attempting to cross Strait of Hormuz; Iran says it has yet to decide whether to join a new round of talks with the U. S.

articles.title: UPMSP UP Board 10th Result Live: आने वाले हैं नतीजे, सबसे पहले परिणाम देखने के लिए यहां तुरंत
articles.summary: यूपी बोर्ड 10वीं के 27 लाख छात्रों का इंतजार आज खत्म होगा। नतीजे आज शाम 4 बजे प्रयागराज स्थित बोर्ड मुख्यालय से प्रेस कॉन्फ्रेंस के जरिए जारी किए जाएंगे। उत्तर प्रदेश माध्यमिक शिक्षा परिषद (UPMSP) आज यानी 23 अप्रैल को लाखों छात्र-छात्राओं का इंतजार खत्म करने जा रहा है।

articles.title: ट्रंप बोले- समझदारी से समझौता नहीं किया जा सकता; युद्धविराम की समय-सीमा पर व्हाइट हाउस ने क्या कहा?
articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति ट्रम्प ने कहा है कि समझदारी से समझौता नहीं किया जा सकता। व्हाइट हाउस ने युद्धविराम की समय-सीमा पर बयान जारी किया है। ट्रम्प की टिप्पणियों और व्हाइट हाउस के बयान के पीछे के कारणों पर चर्चा की जा रही है।

articles.summary: ईरान के इस्लामिक रिवोल्यूशनरी गार्ड कॉर्प्स ने बुधवार को तीन कार्गो जहाजों पर हमला किया और दो को ज़ब्त कर लिया. यह घटना ईरान जंग को लेकर ट्रंप की ओर से युद्धविराम को बढ़ाये जाने के बाद हुई.
